title: trifolium aureum
intro: Trifolium aureum, also known as the golden clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and three-leafed structure. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Trifolium aureum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
